channel.title: Conraid - Slackware current packages
channel.description: Corrado Franco (Conraid) Slackware current package repository.

item.title: Sun, 22 Feb 2026 16:20:20 UTC
item.description:
Added back Wine. It no longer requires 32-bit libraries to run.
This build includes the staging patches and the Gecko and Mono libraries.
Please test it and let me know if you encounter any problems
or if anything needs to be adjusted. Thanks!
